series_metadata.series_description: Invoices and logs of long distance calls made by agency personnel and related records

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
